backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, clip management (CRUD operations), viral score calculations, trending analytics, clip similarity scoring, and access control with admin/user permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the admin route debug information enhancement feature, listing affected files (App.tsx, useIsOwner.ts) and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, and configuration files with detailed descriptions of their functionality and recent enhancements.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script import, titled 'Beast Clipping'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with TanStack Router setup, managing video playback state, clip selection, AI suggestions, and admin route with detailed debug information display for authentication troubleshooting.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with retry functionality and navigation back to home.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying system statistics (total clips, trending clips count) and a detailed analytics table with loading states, error handling, and retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single clip as a card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog. Supports selection state and click handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved clips using ClipCard components, with loading states, empty state messaging, and clip selection/deletion handlers.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clips with viral scores, allowing users to select suggestions to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes/seconds), supporting both manual entry and pre-populated suggestions from selected clips or AI.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing branding, Internet Identity authentication button, and conditional admin panel link for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation button that triggers auto-generation of clip suggestions.
Badge component displaying viral potential scores with color-coded styling and icons (flame/trending/sparkles) based on score thresholds (80+, 50+, below 50).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: React component that renders a responsive YouTube video player embedded in a Card component using an iframe with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing it with Internet Identity credentials and admin token from URL parameters, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor.
Hook that provides auto-generation of clip suggestions using mock AI logic (calculating viral scores and timestamps), with a mutation to call the backend's generateClipsAutomatically method.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Hook that handles clip creation with a mutation to save clips to the backend, calculating viral scores based on duration and title characteristics.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook that fetches all clips from the backend and provides a delete mutation with loading state tracking for individual clip deletions.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook that manages clip timestamp state (start/end minutes and seconds), provides validation, formatting, and conversion utilities for time ranges.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive React context and hook implementation for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Hook that checks if the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method, with extensive debug logging for troubleshooting access control.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Hook that fetches trending clips from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook that provides YouTube URL validation and video ID extraction utilities using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using HSL color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens for a component-based UI system.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a YouTube video clipping application called 'Beast Clipping', listing completed features, known issues (including admin panel access denial), and architectural notes.
